latin: Suricata et sus catulo leonis maestissimo dixerunt: 'curas nullas habe!' et cantare coeperunt de vita sine sollicitudine vivenda. 'haec verba omnes curas solvunt!'

questions.prompt: Who teaches the lion cub this philosophy?

questions.target: Have no worries — live without anxiety
choices: Have no worries — live without anxiety

translation: A meerkat and a warthog said to a very sad lion cub: 'Have no worries!' And they began to sing about living life without anxiety. 'These words solve all worries!'
